problems_encountered.description: HTTP 403 error when attempting to delete project 7b71eeb1-542f-4b9b-966c-a001f3d1ee0c. API returned 'Unexpected response status (expected 204, got: 403)'

tool_response_summary: Delete operation failed with 403 Forbidden error. The authenticated user may lack permissions to delete this project.
execution_notes: Tool executed in 100ms. Received permission denied error. This may be due to insufficient privileges or the project may have dependencies preventing deletion. The tool call itself worked correctly but the operation was rejected by the API.
